metadata.title: いつくしみ深き
metadata.subtitle: What a Friend We Have in Jesus (Japanese)
metadata.lyricist: Joseph M. Scriven (1819–1886), translated to Japanese by the editorial committee of 新撰讃美歌 (1888): Okuno Masatsuna (1823–1910), Uemura Masahisa (1858–1925), Matsuyama Takayoshi (1846–1935)
metadata.x_pd_basis: All three editors of 新撰讃美歌 (1888) — Okuno (d. 1910), Uemura (d. 1925), Matsuyama (d. 1935) — died > 70 years ago. Original lyricist Scriven (d. 1886) and composer Converse (d. 1918) likewise > 100 years ago
metadata.x_translator: Editorial committee of 新撰讃美歌 (Okuno, Uemura, Matsuyama)
